academic.title: Academic
academic.summary: Run your entire academic cycle in one place - enrollments, classes, timetables, attendance, grading, and CBC-ready report cards.
academic.desc: Students, classes, timetable, attendance, grades, report cards

highlights.0: Student profiles with guardians, medical notes, and enrollment history
highlights.1: Classes, sections, and streams aligned to Kenyan grade levels
highlights.2: Timetable builder with teacher and room assignments
highlights.3: Daily attendance with bulk marking and absence alerts
highlights.4: Gradebooks, exams, and report cards mapped to CBC strands
highlights.5: Online admissions linked to your public school website

whoItsFor.0: School administrators managing enrollments and academic records
whoItsFor.1: Teachers recording attendance and entering grades
whoItsFor.2: Parents viewing timetables, attendance, and report cards

academic.kenyaContext: Built for CBC workflows - track learning areas, formative assessments, and term reports the way Kenyan schools actually report progress.

finance.title: Finance
finance.tagline: Fees, invoices, and payroll without spreadsheets
finance.summary: Set fee structures, send invoices, collect payments via M-Pesa or bank transfer, and track payroll - all tied to each student account.

highlights.0: Flexible fee structures by class, term, or boarding status
highlights.1: Automated invoices with balances and payment history per student
highlights.2: M-Pesa-ready payment links with exact amounts pre-filled
highlights.3: Fee reminders via WhatsApp before due dates
highlights.4: Expense tracking and financial reports for bursars
highlights.5: Staff payroll records alongside school fee collections

whoItsFor.0: Bursars and finance officers managing school fees
whoItsFor.1: Administrators reviewing collections and outstanding balances
whoItsFor.2: Parents paying fees from their portal or payment links

finance.kenyaContext: Parents expect M-Pesa and clear fee statements. ShuleOS keeps every shilling accounted for in KES, with reminders that reach parents on WhatsApp.

operations.title: Operations
operations.summary: Manage library books, school transport routes, events, and staff records - the day-to-day operations that keep your school running.

highlights.0: Library catalog with lending, returns, and overdue tracking
highlights.1: Transport routes, bus assignments, and student pickup lists
highlights.2: School events with registrations and campus visit scheduling
highlights.3: Staff directory with roles, departments, and HR records
highlights.4: Inventory-friendly workflows for uniforms and materials
highlights.5: Operational reports for administrators and directors

whoItsFor.0: Operations managers coordinating transport and events
whoItsFor.1: Librarians tracking books and student borrowing
whoItsFor.2: Administrators overseeing staff and school logistics

operations.kenyaContext: From matatu-route transport lists to prize-giving day registrations, operations modules match how Kenyan schools run outside the classroom.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.summary: Dashboards and reports for attendance trends, fee collection, academic performance, and branch comparisons - decisions backed by data.
analytics.desc: Dashboards, branch comparison, attendance & finance reports

highlights.0: Executive dashboards for directors and school owners
highlights.1: Attendance heatmaps and chronic absenteeism alerts
highlights.2: Fee collection rates and outstanding balance summaries
highlights.3: Academic performance trends by class, subject, or term
highlights.4: Branch comparison for schools with multiple campuses
highlights.5: Exportable reports for board meetings and MOE submissions

whoItsFor.0: School directors reviewing performance at a glance
whoItsFor.1: Administrators preparing term-end and annual reports

analytics.kenyaContext: Term reports, fee collection targets, and CBC progress summaries - all in dashboards your leadership team can read in minutes, not days.

schoolWebsites.title: School Websites
schoolWebsites.summary: Launch a branded public website with online admissions, events, and contact details - connected directly to your ShuleOS portal.

highlights.0: Branded homepage with your logo, colours, and cover image
highlights.1: About, programs, gallery, and contact sections
highlights.2: Online admissions form feeding straight into your admin queue
highlights.3: Public events page for open days and school activities
highlights.4: Three templates: Modern, Classic, and Minimal
highlights.5: Staff login link connecting visitors to the school portal

whoItsFor.0: Schools launching or upgrading their public web presence
whoItsFor.2: Marketing staff showcasing programs and achievements

schoolWebsites.kenyaContext: Parents often discover your school on WhatsApp or Google first. A professional site with online admissions helps you capture enquiries before they go to a competitor.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.summary: Real-time messaging between teachers, parents, students, and administrators - plus bulk announcements when you need everyone at once.

highlights.0: Direct conversations between teachers and guardians
highlights.2: Message history tied to student and staff profiles
highlights.3: Notifications for new messages and urgent alerts
highlights.4: Role-based access so students, parents, and staff see the right threads
highlights.5: Integrates with fee reminders and event updates

whoItsFor.0: Teachers communicating with parents about assignments and behaviour
whoItsFor.2: Parents staying in touch without visiting the office

messaging.kenyaContext: Kenyan parents live on WhatsApp. ShuleOS messaging keeps school communication structured and logged, while outreach campaigns can reach guardians on the channels they already use.

parentStudentPortals.title: Parent & Student Portals
parentStudentPortals.summary: Dedicated portals so parents track fees, grades, and timetables while students submit work, view schedules, and message teachers - from any phone or browser.

highlights.0: Parent dashboard with linked children, fees, and attendance at a glance
highlights.1: Pay school fees via M-Pesa or payment links without visiting the office
highlights.2: View report cards, timetables, assignments, and school events in real time
highlights.3: Student portal for homework submission, grades, library, and messages
highlights.4: Secure login with role-based access - parents only see their own children
highlights.5: Works on mobile browsers and low-bandwidth connections common in Kenya

whoItsFor.0: Parents who want fee balances and academic updates without phone calls
whoItsFor.1: Students checking assignments, schedules, and exam results
whoItsFor.2: Schools reducing front-office queues and paper notices

parentStudentPortals.kenyaContext: Most Kenyan parents manage school life from their phone. ShuleOS portals give them the same clarity the bursar and class teacher have - fees in KES, CBC report cards, and WhatsApp-friendly updates.
